_meta.task: Resolve EТ201459 (ЭТ201459) wagon NUMBERS to model+capacity to de-fit the innovative x0.9595 lever
_meta.reason: Wagon model is NOT encoded in the 8-digit number (digit 1=род only: 5=полувагон, digit 2=осность). Model -> number mapping lives only in АБД ПВ (official РЖД automated wagon-park DB). Every FREE web frontend gates it: gruzivagon.info returns no_user/no_premium for model + sits behind a captcha and a WAF ('Кардинал' blocks direct API calls); vgs-as.in sells the DB as a paid export (railmaps@mail.ru); vagon.by/number and estiw.ru only decode род/control-digit, not model; alta.ru/rail_tracking needs a contract.
_meta.endpoint_found: gruzivagon.info POST /components/ajax/ajax.php?task=CheckWagon  body={wagon,recaptcha_anchor,hash=md5(JSON.stringify({wagon,recaptcha_anchor}))} -> returns html.model, html.model_id, html.date_construction, html.full_type BUT only for registered/VIP users; anonymous => error:'no_user'. Direct curl => WAF 'Обнаружена попытка взлома'.
_meta.blocking_note: Sanctioned captcha fallback (shared Playwright browser) was occupied by a sibling agent for the entire window ('Browser is already in use'); could not drive the captcha form to obtain model rows.
_meta.next_step_to_close: Run the gruzivagon /check form in an isolated browser, solve the image captcha, register a free account; or buy/obtain an АБД ПВ extract; then map each number below to html.model + capacity and set innovative=true iff model in {12-9761-02,12-9833-01,12-9853,12-9869,12-196-01,12-196-02,12-2143,12-2159,12-6744}.
_meta.fitted_expectation_from_receipt: All 6 ЭТ201459 wagons priced identically at 31224 RUB/wagon classic at 699 km, so the engine currently treats them ALL as classic (no x0.9595). Resolving models would CONFIRM (all classic) or BREAK that assumption.
